The type of the task. Can be, "regular", "condition", "title", "playbook", or "start".

outputs.description: Tasks.scriptId The task related script (empty if manual). Tasks.startDate
outputs.name: The task state. Can be, "inprogress", "Completed", "WillNotBeExecuted", "Error", "Waiting", "Blocked", and empty string for not started.

outputs.description: Tasks.completedDate The task completed date. Tasks.dueDate
outputs.name: The task start date.

outputs.description: Tasks.parentPlaybookID The task parent playbook ID (in case the task is part of sub-playbook). Tasks.completedBy
outputs.name: The task due date (SLA).
